description.zh: 南北朝是中国历史上南北对峙的分裂时期。南朝（宋齐梁陈）偏安江南，重文轻武，门阀士族把控政治；北朝（北魏、东西魏、北齐北周）由鲜卑等少数民族建立，尚武崇实。南北文化碰撞融合，佛教在此时期空前兴盛，「南朝四百八十寺」成为时代标志。
description.en: The Northern and Southern Dynasties was a period of north-south division in Chinese history. The Southern Dynasties (Song, Qi, Liang, Chen) held the Jiangnan region, favoring literary culture with aristocratic clans dominating politics. The Northern Dynasties (Northern Wei, Eastern/Western Wei, Northern Qi/Zhou), established by Xianbei and other non-Han peoples, valued martial prowess. Cultural fusion between north and south occurred alongside unprecedented Buddhist flourishing.
